title: The Eyes Have It
challenge: Spend 5 minutes tonight sitting in silence, looking into each other's eyes without speaking. Reflect on the first time you felt 'seen' by them.

title: Sacred Space
challenge: Identify one area in your home that feels cluttered. Work together for 20 minutes to clear it and turn it into a place of peace.

title: Love Notes
challenge: Write a physical love letter to your spouse highlighting three things you admire about their character. Hide it where they'll find it during the day.

title: Walk and Talk
challenge: Take a 30-minute walk without phones. Ask: 'What is one thing I can do this week to make you feel more loved?'

title: The Power of Touch
challenge: Give your spouse a 10-minute shoulder or foot massage without expecting anything in return.

title: Culinary Connection
challenge: Cook a new meal together from scratch. Focus on the teamwork and the fun, not the perfection of the dish.

title: Prayer Partnership
challenge: Pray together specifically for each other's hidden burdens or anxieties tonight.

title: Dreaming Together
challenge: Spend an evening discussing where you'd like to be in 5 years. Write down three shared goals.

title: Gratitude Jar
challenge: Start a jar where you both drop notes of things the other did that you appreciated this week.

title: Phone-Free Evening
challenge: From 6 PM until you go to bed, put both of your phones in a drawer and focus entirely on each other.

title: Affirmation Day
challenge: Today, aim to give your spouse at least five genuine compliments throughout the day.

title: Memory Lane
challenge: Look through your wedding album or early dating photos. Share your favorite memory from that season.

title: Acts of Service
challenge: Quietly do one chore that your spouse usually handles, just to lighten their load.

title: New Hobby Exploration
challenge: Research a hobby you've never tried but both find interesting. Plan a time to try a 'trial' version.

title: Playlist of Us
challenge: Create a shared Spotify/YouTube playlist of songs that define your relationship history.

title: Morning Ritual
challenge: Spend the first 10 minutes of your day cuddling or talking before checking any devices.

title: The Gift of Presence
challenge: Sit and listen to your spouse talk about their day for 15 minutes without offering any advice—just empathy.

title: Unexpected Date
challenge: Surprise your spouse with a mini-date (even just coffee or a drive) during the middle of the week.

title: Legacy Talk
challenge: Discuss what kind of legacy you want your marriage to leave for your children or community.

title: Physical Play
challenge: Engage in a lighthearted physical activity: a game of tag, a pillow fight, or a dance in the kitchen.

title: Shared Scripture
challenge: Choose a verse or passage that speaks to your marriage and memorize it together this week.

title: Laughter Therapy
challenge: Find a comedy special or funny movie and just laugh together for an hour.

title: The 'Check-In'
challenge: Ask: 'On a scale of 1-10, how connected do you feel to me this week? What would make it a 10?'

title: Outdoor Adventure
challenge: Visit a local park or trail you've never been to and explore it together.

title: Forgiveness Focus
challenge: Is there a small 'nagging' resentment you've been holding? Choose to voice it kindly and then let it go.

title: Future Planning
challenge: Plan your 'dream' vacation in detail, even if you don't intend to take it anytime soon.

title: Intellectual Intimacy
challenge: Read a long-form article or a chapter of a book together and discuss your takeaways.

title: The Kindness Challenge
challenge: Speak only words of kindness to your spouse for 24 hours. No sarcasm, no snapping.

title: Tech-Free Meal
challenge: Have a dinner out (or in) where both phones are completely left in another room/car.

title: Adoration List
challenge: Write down 10 things you love about your spouse's physical appearance and share it with them.

title: Spiritual Growth
challenge: Attend a service or watch a spiritual teaching together and discuss one point that challenged you.

title: Home Spa
challenge: Create a spa-like atmosphere at home with candles and music. Give each other a relaxing experience.

title: Ask Anything
challenge: Use a list of 'deep conversation starters' to learn something new about your spouse's childhood.

title: Community Service
challenge: Find a small way to serve someone else together—bring a meal to a neighbor or donate together.

title: The 'Yes' Day
challenge: Try to say 'yes' to every reasonable request your spouse makes for one entire day.

title: Revisit Your Vows
challenge: Read your wedding vows to each other and discuss which one feels most meaningful right now.

title: Creative Spark
challenge: Do something creative together: paint, build something, or even just color in a complex coloring book.

title: Secret Admirer
challenge: Send your spouse a sweet/flirty text message in the middle of a busy workday.

title: Patience Practice
challenge: Identify one area where you tend to be impatient with your spouse and consciously choose grace this week.

title: Garden of Growth
challenge: Plant something together—a small herb or a flower—and commit to nurturing it as a team.

title: Shared Silence
challenge: Spend 15 minutes sitting together in a beautiful spot, just enjoying the silence and each other's presence.

title: The Best Of...
challenge: Discuss the 'best' things about your relationship so far this year.

title: Skill Swap
challenge: Teach your spouse a simple skill you have that they don't, and vice versa.

title: Encouragement Engine
challenge: Whenever you think something good about your spouse today, say it out loud immediately.

title: Date Night Prep
challenge: Spend 30 minutes planning next month's date night with high intentionality.

title: The Hug Hold
challenge: Give each other a hug that lasts at least 60 seconds. Feel the stress melt away.

title: Values Check
challenge: List your top 5 family values and see how they align with your current lifestyle.

title: Book Store Date
challenge: Go to a bookstore, find a book for each other, and read the first chapter over coffee.

title: Celebration of Us
challenge: Celebrate a 'small win' you had as a couple this week with a special treat or toast.

title: Unplugged Weekend
challenge: Try to go a full 24 hours over the weekend without any social media usage.

title: Reflection Ritual
challenge: Look back at the challenges from this year. Which one brought you closest?

title: Covenant Renewal
challenge: Write a short prayer or statement of commitment for the coming year together.
